original_image_tags: A single page from a manila file folder, showing the reverse side of a document or a separator sheet. The paper is aged and off-white. The upper left corner is cut at an angle. There are two dark punched holes at the top. Faint horizontal lines suggest where a document was once attached. At the bottom, two distinct blue rubber stamp impressions are visible, oriented upside-down relative to the page's main orientation. One stamp is partially faded. The other is clearer but shows ink smearing and is also inverted.
The lower portion of the page contains two blue ink "RECEIVED" stamps, both oriented upside-down.
The page has a faint horizontal crease or fold line running across the middle. There are some minor dark specks and a small dark stain near the top right corner.

elements.description: The page is mostly blank with two upside-down blue ink stamp impressions. One stamp reads: 'RECEIVED JUL 16 4 56 PM '47 TECHNICAL LABOR MEMORY CRYPTOGRAPHIC SECTION'. The second stamp reads: 'RECEIVED JUL 16 2 44 PM '47 INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I. DEPT. OF JUST'.
